name: @theworldtable/loom-engine
description: Custom 2D / 2.5D game engine for TheWorldTable.ai. Canvas2D primary, ECS, render-graph stages, Director-bridge integration.

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:demo
scripts.test: tsx --test tests/smoke.test.ts tests/world.test.ts tests/asset-loader.test.ts tests/animation.test.ts tests/vfx.test.ts tests/audio-input.test.ts tests/director.test.ts tests/combat.test.ts tests/projectile.test.ts tests/arpg.test.ts tests/snapshot-recovery.test.ts tests/touch-input.test.ts

author: TheWorldTable.ai
